---
title: "Part II --- Teaching Programming in Context: Design and Practice"
bibliography: references.bib
author:
  - name: TODO
    affiliations: TODO
  - name: TODO
    affiliations: TODO
---

SOME TEXT INTRODUCITNG THIS PART

## Theme --- Drawing on group dynamics for programming education  

### TitleOfChapterPossiblyShortened [@TeachProgAcross_C16]

SOME TEXT INTRODUCITNG THIS CHAPTER [C16] Peer Programming in Action: Pair Programming in Larger Groups 

SOME TEXT EXPLAINING WHY THIS CHAPTER COULD BE FOR YOU

### TitleOfChapterPossiblyShortened [@TeachProgAcross_C31]

SOME TEXT INTRODUCITNG THIS CHAPTER [C31] Leveraging the heterogeneity - teaching computing skills to a multidisciplinary cohort with a variable skill level

SOME TEXT EXPLAINING WHY THIS CHAPTER COULD BE FOR YOU

### TitleOfChapterPossiblyShortened [@TeachProgAcross_C23]

SOME TEXT INTRODUCITNG THIS CHAPTER [C23] Learning Together Across Modes: Online and On-Site Pair Programming in a Fusion Course

SOME TEXT EXPLAINING WHY THIS CHAPTER COULD BE FOR YOU


## Theme --- Teaching Programming to Novices: Python and Beyond  

### TitleOfChapterPossiblyShortened [@TeachProgAcross_C01]

SOME TEXT INTRODUCITNG THIS CHAPTER [C01] A Practical Guide to Teaching Python as a Computational Tool in an Introductory Data Analysis Course

SOME TEXT EXPLAINING WHY THIS CHAPTER COULD BE FOR YOU

### TitleOfChapterPossiblyShortened [@TeachProgAcross_C29]

SOME TEXT INTRODUCITNG THIS CHAPTER [C29] Notebooks for Novices? Pros and Cons of Jupyter

SOME TEXT EXPLAINING WHY THIS CHAPTER COULD BE FOR YOU

### TitleOfChapterPossiblyShortened [@TeachProgAcross_C07]

SOME TEXT INTRODUCITNG THIS CHAPTER [C07] Second Languages:  Teaching C to Python Novices 

SOME TEXT EXPLAINING WHY THIS CHAPTER COULD BE FOR YOU



## Theme --- Thinking outside the box: designing engaging learning experiences  

### TitleOfChapterPossiblyShortened [@TeachProgAcross_C06]

SOME TEXT INTRODUCITNG THIS CHAPTER [C06] Feminists, anarchists and dungeon masters: co-designing programming teaching experiences

SOME TEXT EXPLAINING WHY THIS CHAPTER COULD BE FOR YOU

### TitleOfChapterPossiblyShortened [@TeachProgAcross_C15]

SOME TEXT INTRODUCITNG THIS CHAPTER [C15] Removing Barriers by Programming without Computers 

SOME TEXT EXPLAINING WHY THIS CHAPTER COULD BE FOR YOU

### TitleOfChapterPossiblyShortened [@TeachProgAcross_C17]

SOME TEXT INTRODUCITNG THIS CHAPTER [C17] Practical approaches to using sound and music in programming pedagogy

SOME TEXT EXPLAINING WHY THIS CHAPTER COULD BE FOR YOU

### TitleOfChapterPossiblyShortened [@TeachProgAcross_C03]

SOME TEXT INTRODUCITNG THIS CHAPTER [C03] Reflections on online teaching 

SOME TEXT EXPLAINING WHY THIS CHAPTER COULD BE FOR YOU

### TitleOfChapterPossiblyShortened [@TeachProgAcross_C43]

SOME TEXT INTRODUCITNG THIS CHAPTER [C43] Seeing Before Coding, Doodling Before Doing: How Teaching Data Visualisation Transforms the Way Students Think 

SOME TEXT EXPLAINING WHY THIS CHAPTER COULD BE FOR YOU



::: {.content-visible when-format="html" unless-format="epub"}

## References {.unnumbered}

:::
